name: Tdap Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for tetanus, diphtheria, and acellular pertussis (Tdap) vaccines. Used in adolescent immunization measures (IMA) and adult immunization measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Tetanus toxoid, reduced diphtheria toxoid, and acellular pertussis vaccine, adsorbed (Tdap)
Tetanus and diphtheria toxoids, not adsorbed, for adult use (Td)
Tetanus and diphtheria toxoids, adsorbed, preservative free, for adult use (Td)
Tetanus and diphtheria toxoids, adsorbed, for adult use (Td)
Tetanus and diphtheria toxoids, adsorbed, for adult use, when DTP or DTaP vaccine is not available
Tetanus, diphtheria toxoids, and acellular pertussis vaccine (Tdap), when administered to individuals 7 years or older, for intramuscular use
Tetanus and diphtheria toxoids adsorbed (Td), preservative free, for use in individuals 7 years or older, for intramuscular use
Tetanus and diphtheria toxoids adsorbed (Td), for use in individuals 7 years or older, for intramuscular use
